info.title: Leonardo.AI Image Generation API
info.description: Create image generations with FLUX, Phoenix, Lucid, Ideogram, GPT Image, Nano Banana, Seedream, and other supported models. Includes generation lifecycle (create, retrieve, delete, list by user).

alchemy.title: Boolean
alchemy.description: Enable to use Alchemy. Note: The appropriate Alchemy version is selected for the specified model. For example, XL models will use Alchemy V2.

contrastRatio.title: Float
contrastRatio.description: Contrast Ratio to use with Alchemy. Must be a float between 0 and 1 inclusive.

contrast.description: Adjusts the contrast level of the generated image. Used in Phoenix and Flux models. Accepts values [1.0, 1.3, 1.8, 2.5, 3, 3.5, 4, 4.5]. For Phoenix, if alchemy is true, contrast needs to be 2.5 or higher.
contrast.title: Float

expandedDomain.title: Boolean
expandedDomain.description: Enable to use the Expanded Domain feature of Alchemy.

fantasyAvatar.title: Boolean
fantasyAvatar.description: Enable to use the Fantasy Avatar feature.

guidance_scale.title: Float
guidance_scale.description: How strongly the generation should reflect the prompt. 7 is recommended. Must be between 1 and 20.

height.title: Int
height.description: The input height of the images. Must be between 32 and 1536 and be a multiple of 8. Note: Input resolution is not always the same as output resolution due to upscaling from other features.

highContrast.title: Boolean
highContrast.description: Enable to use the High Contrast feature of Prompt Magic. Note: Controls RAW mode. Set to false to enable RAW mode.

highResolution.title: Boolean
highResolution.description: Enable to use the High Resolution feature of Prompt Magic.

init_generation_image_id.title: String
init_generation_image_id.description: The ID of an existing image to use in image2image.

init_image_id.title: String
init_image_id.description: The ID of an Init Image to use in image2image.

init_strength.title: Float
init_strength.description: How strongly the generated images should reflect the original image in image2image. Must be a float between 0.1 and 0.9.

modelId.title: String
modelId.description: The model ID used for image generation. If not provided, uses sd_version to determine the version of Stable Diffusion to use. In-app, model IDs are under the Finetune Models menu. Click on the platform model or your custom model, then click View More. For platform models, you can also use the List Platform Models API.

negative_prompt.title: String
negative_prompt.description: The negative prompt used for the image generation

num_images.title: Int
num_images.description: The number of images to generate. Must be between 1 and 8. If either width or height is over 768, must be between 1 and 4.

num_inference_steps.title: Int
num_inference_steps.description: The Step Count to use for the generation. Must be between 10 and 60. Default is 15.

prompt.title: String
prompt.description: The prompt used to generate images
prompt.default: A majestic cat in the snow

public.title: Boolean
public.description: Whether the generated images should show in the community feed.

tiling.title: Boolean
tiling.description: Whether the generated images should tile on all axis.

transparency.title: TransparencyType
transparency.description: Which type of transparency this image should use

ultra.title: Boolean
ultra.description: Enable to use Ultra mode. Note: can not be used with Alchemy.

unzoom.title: Boolean
unzoom.description: Whether the generated images should be unzoomed (requires unzoomAmount and init_image_id to be set).

unzoomAmount.title: Float
unzoomAmount.description: How much the image should be unzoomed (requires an init_image_id and unzoom to be set to true).

upscaleRatio.title: Float
upscaleRatio.description: How much the image should be upscaled. (Enterprise Only)

width.title: Int
width.description: The input width of the images. Must be between 32 and 1536 and be a multiple of 8. Note: Input resolution is not always the same as output resolution due to upscaling from other features.

controlNet.title: Boolean
controlNet.description: This parameter will be deprecated in September 2024. Please use the controlnets array instead.

weighting.title: Float
weighting.description: This parameter will be deprecated in September 2024. Please use the controlnets array instead.

canvasRequest.title: Boolean
canvasRequest.description: Whether the generation is for the Canvas Editor feature.

canvasInitId.title: String
canvasInitId.description: The ID of an initial image to use in Canvas Editor request.

canvasMaskId.title: String
canvasMaskId.description: The ID of a mask image to use in Canvas Editor request.

enhancePrompt.title: Boolean
enhancePrompt.description: When enabled, your prompt is expanded to include more detail.

enhancePromptInstruction.title: String
enhancePromptInstruction.description: When enhancePrompt is enabled, the prompt is enhanced based on the given instructions.

requestBody.description: Query parameters to be provided in the request body as a JSON object

apiCreditCost.description: API Credits Cost for Image Generation. Available for Production API Users. Note: it will be deprecated. Please use the cost instead.

get.description: This endpoint will provide information about a specific generation

parameters.description: The ID of the generation to return.
parameters.name: id

items.description: This table captures the elements that are applied to Generations.
items.title: generation_elements

delete.description: This endpoint deletes a specific generation

parameters.description: The ID of the generation to delete.
parameters.name: id

get.description: This endpoint returns all generations by a specific user

items.description: This table captures the elements that are applied to a Generations, also the order and weightings used when applied.
items.title: generation_elements

unit.description: The unit of the cost. Can be CREDITS or DOLLARS. Note: DOLLARS unit only supports PAYG plan.

Cursor.title: Cursor
Cursor.description: An opaque cursor used for pagination

description.example: Relight an image with warm, golden tones of late afternoon sunlight for a soft and radiant glow.

name.description: Thumbnail type name (e.g., thumbnailUrl, videoUrl, thumbnailUrlBanner, thumbnailUrlLandscape, thumbnailUrlExtremePortrait)

teamId.description: Team ID if Blueprint belongs to a team

official.description: Whether this is an official Blueprint

NodeInput.title: NodeInput
NodeInput.description: A node input object for customizing a Blueprint Execution

nodeId.description: The ID of the node in the Blueprint

settingName.description:
The type of setting to replace:
- `text`: Direct text replacement (value is a string)
- `imageUrl`: Image URL input (value is a URL string)
- `textVariables`: Text with placeholder variables (value is an array of TextVariable)

oneOf.description: String value. Use for settingName='text' (direct text) or settingName='imageUrl' (image URL)
Array of TextVariable objects. Use only for settingName='textVariables' to replace {{placeholders}} in the Blueprint

value.description:
The replacement value. Type depends on settingName:
- `text`: string (the full text)
- `imageUrl`: string (the image URL)
- `textVariables`: array of TextVariable objects

TextVariable.title: TextVariable
TextVariable.description: A text variable for replacing placeholders in Blueprint templates

name.description: The name of the placeholder variable (without curly braces)

value.description: The value to replace the placeholder with

path.description: Path to the field that caused the error

apiCreditCost.title: Int
apiCreditCost.description: API credits cost, available for Production API users. Note: it will be deprecated. Please use the cost instead.

isVariation.title: Boolean
isVariation.description: If it is a variation image.

isInitImage.title: Boolean
isInitImage.description: If it is an init image uploaded by the user. This image is uploaded from endpoint: Upload init image.

imageToVideo.title: Boolean
imageToVideo.description: If it is an image to video generation.

sd_versions.title: sd_versions
sd_versions.description: The base version of stable diffusion to use if not using a custom model. v1_5 is 1.5, v2 is 2.1, if not specified it will default to v1_5. Also includes SDXL and SDXL Lightning models

akUUID.description: Unique identifier for the element. Elements can be found from the List Elements endpoint.

creatorName.description: Name of the creator of the element

baseModel.description: Base model version for the element

motion.title: Boolean
motion.description: If generation is of motion type.

motionModel.title: String
motionModel.description: The name of the motion model.

motionMP4URL.title: String
motionMP4URL.description: The URL of the motion MP4.

public.title: Boolean
public.description: Whether the generation is public or not

strength.title: strength
strength.description: When training using the PIXEL_ART model type, this influences the training strength.

job_status.title: job_status
job_status.description: The status of the current task.

BlueprintExecutionStatus.title: BlueprintExecutionStatus
BlueprintExecutionStatus.description: The status of a Blueprint Execution.

BlueprintExecution.title: BlueprintExecution
BlueprintExecution.description: Represents the Execution of a Blueprint Version

allOf.description: Whether the Blueprint Execution is public

createdAt.description: Created date of the Blueprint Execution

BlueprintExecutionGenerationsConnection.title: BlueprintExecutionGenerationsConnection
BlueprintExecutionGenerationsConnection.description: A paginated connection of Blueprint Execution Generations

BlueprintExecutionGenerationEdge.title: BlueprintExecutionGenerationEdge
BlueprintExecutionGenerationEdge.description: An edge containing a Blueprint Execution Generation node

cursor.description: Cursor for this edge, used for pagination

BlueprintExecutionGeneration.title: BlueprintExecutionGeneration
BlueprintExecutionGeneration.description: Represents a single generation within a Blueprint Execution

allOf.description: Unique identifier for the Blueprint Execution Generation

generationId.description: The generation ID associated with this execution generation

failedReason.description: Details about why the generation failed, specifically for prompt moderation failures

BlueprintExecutionGenerationStatus.title: BlueprintExecutionGenerationStatus
BlueprintExecutionGenerationStatus.description: The status of a Blueprint Execution Generation

PromptModerationFailureReason.title: PromptModerationFailureReason
PromptModerationFailureReason.description: Details about a generation failure due to prompt moderation

type.description: The type of failure - PROMPT_MODERATION_BLOCKED indicates the prompt was blocked by content moderation

message.example: Generation blocked due to prompt moderation

affectedOutputCount.description: Number of outputs affected by this failure

custom_model_type.title: custom_model_type
custom_model_type.description: The category the most accurately reflects the model.

sd_generation_schedulers.title: sd_generation_schedulers
sd_generation_schedulers.description: The scheduler to generate images with. Defaults to EULER_DISCRETE if not specified.

MOTION_RESOLUTION.title: MOTION_RESOLUTION
MOTION_RESOLUTION.description: The resolution of the upscaled video. RESOLUTION_720 is the only option for now.

initImageId.title: String
initImageId.description: The ID of the init image

initImageType.description: Type indicating whether the init image is uploaded or generated.

preprocessorId.title: numeric
preprocessorId.description: ID of the controlnet. A list of compatible IDs can be found in our guides.

strengthType.description: Strength type for the controlnet. Can only be used for Style, Character and Content Reference controlnets.

akUUID.title: String
akUUID.description: Unique identifier for element. Elements can be found from the List Elements endpoint.

userLoraId.title: Int
userLoraId.description: Unique identifier for user custom element.

seed.title: seed
seed.description: Apply a fixed seed to maintain consistency across generation sets. The maximum seed value is 2147483637 for Flux and 9999999998 for other models

sd_generation_style.title: sd_generation_style
sd_generation_style.description: The style to generate images with. When photoReal is enabled, refer to the Guide section for a full list. When alchemy is disabled, use LEONARDO or NONE. When alchemy is enabled, use ANIME, CREATIVE, DYNAMIC, ENVIRONMENT, GENERAL, ILLUSTRATION, PHOTOGRAPHY, RAYTRACED, RENDER_3D, SKETCH_BW, SKETCH_COLOR, or NONE.

lcm_generation_style.title: lcm_generation_style
lcm_generation_style.description: The style to generate LCM images with.

universal_upscaler_style.title: universal_upscaler_style
universal_upscaler_style.description: The style to upscale images using universal upscaler with. Can not be used with ultraUpscaleStyle.

universal_upscaler_ultra_style.title: universal_upscaler_ultra_style
universal_upscaler_ultra_style.description: The ultra style to upscale images using universal upscaler with. Can not be used with upscalerStyle.

controlnet_type.title: controlnet_type
controlnet_type.description: This parameter will be deprecated in September 2024. Please use the controlnets array instead.

photoRealArg.title: Boolean
photoRealArg.description: Enable the photoReal feature. Requires enabling alchemy and unspecifying modelId (for photoRealVersion V1).

photoRealVersion.title: String
photoRealVersion.description: The version of photoReal to use. Must be v1 or v2.

photoRealStrengthArg.title: Float
photoRealStrengthArg.description: Depth of field of photoReal. Must be 0.55 for low, 0.5 for medium, or 0.45 for high. Defaults to 0.55 if not specified.

photoRealStrengthRes.title: Float
photoRealStrengthRes.description: Depth of field of photoReal used. 0.55 is low, 0.5 is medium, and 0.45 is high. Default is 0.55.

promptMagicVersionArg.title: String
promptMagicVersionArg.description: Prompt magic version v2 or v3, for use when promptMagic: true

promptMagicStrengthArg.title: Float
promptMagicStrengthArg.description: Strength of prompt magic. Must be a float between 0.1 and 1.0

pricingCalculatorServices.title: pricingCalculatorServices
pricingCalculatorServices.description: The services to be chosen for calculating the API credit cost.

imageHeight.title: Int
imageHeight.description: The input height of the images. Must be between 32 and 1024 and be a multiple of 8. Note: Input resolution is not always the same as output resolution due to upscaling from other features

imageWidth.title: Int
imageWidth.description: The input width of the images. Must be between 32 and 1024 and be a multiple of 8. Note: Input resolution is not always the same as output resolution due to upscaling from other features

numImages.title: Int
numImages.description: The number of images to generate. Must be between 1 and 8. If either width or height is over 768, must be between 1 and 4.

canvasRequestType.title: canvasRequestType
canvasRequestType.description: The type of request for the Canvas Editor.

sd_generation_ultra.title: Boolean
sd_generation_ultra.description: If ultra generation mode was used.

pageInfo.title: PageInfo
pageInfo.description: Pagination information following the Relay cursor pagination spec

hasNextPage.description: Whether there is a next page

hasPreviousPage.description: Whether there is a previous page

startCursor.description: Cursor for the first item in the result set

endCursor.description: Cursor for the last item in the result set

bearerAuth.description: Bearer HTTP authentication. Allowed headers `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>`
